# Kim's World — Portfolio of Kimberley Kam

> Kimberley Kam is a Principal Product Designer and Design Strategist based in Melbourne, Australia.
> Available for in-house roles and consulting engagements. Remote-friendly.

Kimberley Kam (Kim) is a Principal Product Designer and Design Strategist with deep experience
shipping products at scale. She works across AI product design, design systems, product strategy,
UX design, and design leadership. Kim's work sits at the intersection of systems thinking, visual
storytelling, and product rigour — from 0-to-1 product work through to mature design operations.

She is currently open to new opportunities: Principal Product Designer, Design Strategist,
Head of Design, Product Designer (AI), or senior IC/leadership roles where design and strategy
intersect. Remote-friendly from Melbourne, Australia.

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kimberley-kam/
Contact: hello@kimsworld.com

## Expertise

- AI Product Design — designing products where AI is a core experience, not a feature bolt-on
- Design Strategy — translating ambiguous business problems into design direction and roadmap
- Product Design — end-to-end product design from discovery through to delivery at scale
- Design Systems — building token-based, component-driven systems that scale across teams
- UX Design — interaction design, information architecture, usability, user research
- Systems Thinking — designing for complexity: cross-surface, multi-stakeholder, long-horizon
- Product Strategy — working at the intersection of user needs, business goals, and technical feasibility
- Design Leadership — leading design teams, setting design culture, stakeholder communication
- Product Ownership — bridging design and product management, backlog ownership, prioritisation
- UX Writing — content strategy, microcopy, tone of voice systems
- Accessibility — WCAG AA compliance, inclusive design, assistive technology testing
- Design Operations — tooling, process, rituals, and infrastructure that make design teams effective

## Articles (Thinking About)

- [The Case for Boring UX](https://kimsworld.com/thinking-about/the-case-for-boring-ux/): The best UX is invisible — why "boring" is a compliment and delight is dessert, not the main course.
- [The Overcooked Problem](https://kimsworld.com/thinking-about/ai-overcooked/): AI is making teams produce faster than they can verify — and quality is burning. The real cost of AI fatigue no one admits.
- [Good UX vs Bad UX — Interactive Demo](https://kimsworld.com/thinking-about/good-ux-bad-ux-demo/): A hands-on interactive demo showing the difference between design that respects users and design that frustrates them.
- [AI-Native Product Design](https://kimsworld.com/thinking-about/ai-native-product-design/): What it means to design products where AI is not a feature bolt-on but a core part of the experience.

## About

- [Get to Know Kim](https://kimsworld.com/get-to-know-kim/): An interactive game of opinion polls — pick your side and see how your design instincts compare to Kim's.
- [What I'm Noodling On](https://kimsworld.com/noodling-on/): A FigJam-style canvas of works-in-progress, ideas, and live experiments.
- [Kim's World](https://kimsworld.com/): Portfolio home — a campfire-aesthetic hub for Kim's work, thinking, and creative experiments.

## Contact

To reach Kim: hello@kimsworld.com
